title: SuperFancyClouds
description: A mod that does some fun stuff to clouds to make them a bit less plain
body:
SuperFancyClouds is a pretty simple client mod! It does what it says on the tin, more or less, making clouds render a lot more fancy. See the gallery for examples!

This mod has no options or configuration, as it's purely a 'use it if you like it' sort of VFX mod.

Clouds use Perlin Noise to generate, and use multi-threading to ensure the fewest framerate drops possible. Clouds have varying distribution across the world, meaning they can be very thin (or even nonexistent) in some places, but very abundant and other places. They move and change shape over time slowly as well.
